title: FabriStorm
description: This modpack will let you experience Crackers Wither Storm mod in a whole new, optimised, and good-looking way!
body:
# 🌪️ Welcome to FabriStorm!
[![Sparked host use code EverythingVoxy for 25% off](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/gh/MRCodERDude/EverythingVoxy@main/Artboard_3.png)
](https://billing.sparkedhost.com/aff.php?aff=3199)

Looking for the **_ultimate_** Cracker's Wither Storm experience? You just found it.

**FabriStorm** is a modpack built specifically around everyone's favorite terrifying boss, but with a major under-the-hood twist. By using the [Kilt](https://modrinth.com/mod/kilt) mod, FabriStorm brings the chaos to the Fabric mod loader instead of (Neo)Forge!

![FabriStorm Banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/447120c9d61c721c61885bdbd0fb1b1060285cc3.png)

Why play FabriStorm?

    ✨ Stunning Visuals: Carefully selected mods and shaderpacks to make your world absolutely stunning!

    🚀 Boosted Performance: Highly optimized to keep your frame rates high and the lag low, no matter how crazy the storm gets.

    ⚔️ Built for Adventure: Whether you're a hardcore survivalist, an explorer, or just want to face off against an improved Wither Storm, this pack is tailored just for you.

So, are you ready to beat the **Wither Storm**? If you are try out this modpack!

[![Sparked host use code EverythingVoxy for 25% off](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/gh/MRCodERDude/EverythingVoxy@main/Artboard_1.png)
](https://billing.sparkedhost.com/aff.php?aff=3199)
